name: O.R.T. Technologies Ltd
summary: O.R.T. Technologies Ltd, through its subsidiaries, supplies automotive fleet management and electronic payment method products in Israel. The company provides smart cards; and management and control systems, as well as related products for public transportation. It also offers automated ticketing systems; rear office servers; driver consoles, sales machines, and device microbiology systems on vehicles; and manual and automatic devices for sale and validation stations. The company was formerly known as Rapac Electronics Ltd. and changed its name to O.R.T. Technologies Ltd in 2006. O.R.T. Technologies Ltd was founded in 2000 and is based in Herzliya, Israel.
